question: Is the image a realistic photography of a rainy night city street corner captured from a low-angle wide shot perspective?
Is the road surface wet and glistening, showing reflections of lights?
Is there a black metal lamp post in the left foreground emitting warm yellow light from the top?
Are there exactly 2 fire hydrants positioned side by side beneath the lamp post?
Is the left fire hydrant common red and the right fire hydrant bright cyan blue?
Is there a white zebra crossing cutting across the center foreground?
Are there exactly 2 metal trash cans located to the right foreground of the zebra crossing?
Are the trash cans arranged front-to-back, with the front one blue (lid half open) and the back one dark gray (lid closed)?
Are there exactly 2 taxis parked side by side behind the trash cans at the rear edge of the zebra crossing?
Is the left taxi a classic yellow taxi with its hood facing left?
Is the right taxi matte black with an illuminated yellow roof sign?
Are there exactly 3 bicycles in the left middle area leaning against a gray parking post?
Does the front bicycle have a red frame with handlebars angled upper right, and the middle bicycle a white frame?
Does the rear bicycle have a transparent acrylic frame?
Is there a black bus stop bench in the right middle area with a thin layer of water pooled on the seat?
Are there exactly 2 suitcases to the right of the bench: a dark gray hard-shell in front (handle half extended) and a silver soft-sided behind (handle retracted)?
Is there a traffic signal in the upper right showing a lit green light facing the left side of the frame?
Is there a pedestrian crossing indicator box below the signal displaying a white walking figure icon?
Is there a green metal newspaper box with rounded corners and a closed door in the left middle area?
Is the largest puddle directly in front of the newspaper box elliptical in shape?
Do the water surfaces of the puddles reflect the taxi headlights?
Are there exactly 3 pedestrians standing at the edge of the zebra crossing in the center-right?
Is the front pedestrian wearing a dark blue long raincoat and holding a transparent umbrella?
Is the pedestrian behind wearing a reflective silver raincoat with no umbrella?
Is the leftmost pedestrian wearing a gray knit cap and black puffer jacket, walking toward the right?
Are there exactly 2 small dogs between the pedestrians on thin black leashes?
Is there a brown short-haired dog with its nose pointed toward the largest puddle?
Is there a white small dog wearing a bright blue raincoat and yellow rain boots?
Is the white dog positioned to the right of the brown dog?
Is there a shop window in the distant right emanating a pink-purple neon glow?
Are the pedestrians and dogs free of obvious anatomical distortions (e.g., extra limbs, malformed faces)?
Are the main subjects complete and not inappropriately cut off by the frame edge?
